## Problem

What general harness problem does this solve?

## Change

What rules, roles, templates, checks, scenarios, or examples changed?

## Evidence

- [ ] `python3 tools/harness_eval.py` passes
- [ ] Relevant scenario input/oracle updated or added
- [ ] Local links and privacy checks pass
- [ ] No safety, specialist, or human-review gate was weakened without explicit rationale

## Compatibility

What must existing template users change, if anything?

## Scope

- [ ] No unrelated cleanup
- [ ] No private project data, credentials, task IDs, or notification recipients
